calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of A Request For Dismissal
Off Calendar May-09-2022 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement And Retaining Jurisdiction To Enforce That Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-22-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kenneth Mitchell, via zoom, for Mario Bolanos, Petitioner; Bryan Kreft, via zoom, for Eneida Osibin, Objector.

The court confirms with counsel that the reported settlement is in the best interest of the beneficiaries. The court advises counsel that the court intends to grant the petition but will not further order the parties to perform their contractual obligations and offers counsel what the remedy might be to enforce the agreement pursuant to CCP 664.6. The court points to paragraph five (5) of the agreement, which anticipates a dismissal being filed. Mr. Kreft reports that he believes that the petitioner will be filing a Request for Dismissal once the court approves the agreement. The preceding is confirmed by Mr. Mitchell.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Order Approving Settlement Agreement, etc., is submitted. A Status for the filing of a request for dismissal is set for May-09-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Teebay. Not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-29-2021 Vacated

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee And For A Determination That A Real Property Is An Asset Of The Trust
Off Calendar Jun-14-2021 Continued To Oct-18-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kenneth Mitchell, via ZOOM, counsel for Mario Bolanos, Petitioner; Bryan Kreft and Michael McLaughlin, via ZOOM, counsel for Eneida Osibin, Respondent.

The court begins by querying regarding the status of mediation. Counsel report that mediation was unsuccessful. The court then queries counsel regarding trial readiness. Mr. McLaughlin reports that this matter should be set for trial sometime in the Fall of this year. Mr. Mitchell reports that there are a few pending depositions, discovery, and a possible motion from his side. Counsel and court confirm that a trial setting in October should be fine.

The Petition to Appoint Successor Trustee, etc., is set for trial in the department of the Presiding Judge (206) on October 18, 2021, at 9:30 a.m. Order for the same signed in open court. Counsel is advised to monitor the court's register of actions to obtain a copy of the order.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee And For A Determination That A Real Property Is An Asset Of The Trust
Off Calendar Mar-01-2021 Continued To Jun-14-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee And For A Determination That A Real Property Is An Asset Of The Trust
Off Calendar Dec-07-2020 Continued To Mar-01-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee And For A Determination That A Real Property Is An Asset Of The Trust
Off Calendar Aug-24-2020 Continued To Dec-07-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee And For A Determination That A Real Property Is An Asset Of The Trust
Off Calendar Jun-22-2020 Continued To Aug-24-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kenneth Mitchell appeared by telephone for Mario Bolanos (Petitioner).
Robert Weiss and Bryan Kreft appeared by telephone for Eneida Osibin (Respondent/designated Successor-Trustee).

The Court noted that it has not had a chance to review the response by Eneida, raised the question of the Santa Cruz property not being titled in the trust, questions how the Parties intend to go forward and questions if there is much cash. Mr. Mitchell stated that the Santa Cruz property is not a primary issue, that it is unimproved land and not of value, raised the issue of Mrs. Bolanos not having representation and the issue of capacity, and stated that he strongly objects to the Respondent being appointed as the Successor Trustee as she was instrumental in the changing of title of the property. Mr. Mitchell also requested that the Court appoint a Neutral Fiduciary and refer the matter to a Court Investigator. Mr. Kreft stated that he believes that the Mother (Mrs. Bolanos) had capacity and that discovery is needed. Mr. Mitchell stated that he does not believe there is much cash, that he believes Mrs. Bolanos' income is used for her care and that he has no objection to the Court referring the matter to mediation. The Court explained the roll of the Court Investigator and raised the issue of having an independent examination of Mrs. Bolanos. Mr. Weiss stated that he thinks mediation is a fine idea. The Court raised the issue of the cost of litigation and encourages the Parties to talk to each other about what information is needed to make mediation successful. The Petition to Appoint Successor Trustee, etc. is continued to August 24, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to set the matter for hearing and for status of mediation. Discussion was held about perhaps providing one joint status report.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee And For A Determination That A Real Property Is An Asset Of The Trust
